TEXT.source: Seediq Wikipedia, article: S Čhl Čngan ČSulungan
TEXT.citation: S Čhl Čngan ČSulungan. (2025, May 05). In Wikipedia [Seediq]. https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/S Čhl Čngan ČSulungan
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_S Čhl Čngan ČSulungan, title = S Čhl Čngan ČSulungan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/S Čhl Čngan ČSulungan} }

S.FORM: = S Čhl Čngan Č/Sulungan = Gaga mniq Kawsyungsu Tawyuncyu ka alang S Čhl Čngan Č/Sulungan. 41 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 108 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 88% niqan 95 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 12% niqan 13 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun 69%, Rukai 3%, Cou 7%, Paiwan 1%, Hla'alua 6%, Seejiq/Seediq/Seejiq/Seejiq/Sediq 1%.
S.PHON: = s*ńßl*Ňčan*/suluŇčan = gaga mniq kawsjuŇčsu tawjun ¶ju ka alaŇč s*ńßl*Ňčan*/suluŇčan. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, bunun **%, …ĺukai *%, ¶ou *%, paiwan *%, ńßla'alua *%, s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ôdiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ôdiq *%.
S.FORM: = S Čhl Čngan Č/Sulungan = Gaga mniq Kawsyungsu Tawyuncyu ka alang S Čhl Čngan Č/Sulungan. 41 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 108 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 88% niqan 95 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 12% niqan 13 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun 69%, Rukai 3%, Cou 7%, Paiwan 1%, Hla'alua 6%, Seejiq/Seediq/Seejiq/Seejiq/Sediq 1%.
S.PHON: = s*ńßl*Ňčan*/suluŇčan = gaga mniq kawsjuŇčsu tawjun ¶ju ka alaŇč s*ńßl*Ňčan*/suluŇčan. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, bunun **%, …ĺukai *%, ¶ou *%, paiwan *%, ńßla'alua *%, s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ôdiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ôdiq *%.
